proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1(x2) = const_mul_left(x0, x1, x2) }(a, identity_fn[Real], x)

goal: const_add_right(const_mul_left(a, identity_fn[Real]), b, x) = a * x + b
proof: function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0(x1) + x2 = const_add_right(x0, x2, x1) }(const_mul_left(a, identity_fn[Real]), x, b)

goal: affine_real(a, b, x) = a * x + b
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1 + x2 = affine_real(x0, x2, x1) }(a, x, b)

goal: affine_real(a, b, x) = const_add_right(const_mul_left(a, identity_fn[Real]), b, x)
